stories.title: Ferrari ADUO Power Unit Upgrade Coming to Austria — 30HP and Halving the Mercedes Gap
stories.angle: Ferrari's first ADUO power unit upgrade is scheduled to debut at the Austrian GP (June 26-28). The upgrade targets the thermal side of the ICE and is expected to deliver approximately 30 horsepower — enough to halve the current power gap to Mercedes. Lewis Hamilton now trails championship leader Kimi Antonelli by just 41 points. The upgrade gives Ferrari's title bid a genuine engine edge for the first time.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's first ADUO power unit upgrade is coming to Austria.

Expected gains: ~30 horsepower. Impact: halves the gap to Mercedes.

Hamilton already trails by just 41 points. Now he's getting a new engine too. 🔴 #F1 #LewisHamilton

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Ferrari ADUO upgrade for Austria doesn't just add power.

It potentially halves the performance gap to Mercedes — the team that's dominated 2026.

If it works as billed, Hamilton's title bid just became very real. #F1 #Ferrari

article.headline: Ferrari's Austrian GP Engine Upgrade: 30 Horsepower and the Shot at Halving the Mercedes Gap

stories.title: Red Bull's Austrian Upgrade — Eliminating the Final 6kg, Verstappen's Future on the Line
stories.angle: Red Bull will bring their second major upgrade of 2026 to Austria. Team principal Laurent Mekies described the process as putting the RB22 "on a diet" — the car started the season 12kg overweight, was cut to 6kg in Miami, and the Austria package aims to close the gap entirely. If the upgrade fails to deliver meaningful results, Verstappen's August exit clause becomes a live conversation.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's Austrian GP upgrade targets the last 6kg of excess weight on the RB22.

The car started the season 12kg overweight. They cut it to 6kg in Miami. Austria finishes the diet.

Laurent Mekies: "this step alone won't be enough." But it's necessary. #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: Red Bull's Austrian Upgrade: The Final Diet — and What Happens If It Doesn't Work

stories.title: Championship Math After Barcelona — How Hamilton Closes 41 Points in 15 Races
stories.angle: After Hamilton's 106th win and Antonelli's DNF in Barcelona, the gap went from 66 to 41 points. With 15 races left and the ADUO upgrade arriving, Hamilton is now legitimately in the title hunt. What needs to happen across the triple-header (Austria/Britain/Belgium) for Hamilton to emerge as the favorite?

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The 2026 F1 title race after 7 of 22 rounds:

🏆 Antonelli — 156 pts
🔴 Hamilton — 115 pts (-41)
⚪ Russell — 106 pts (-50)

Two weeks ago Hamilton trailed by 66. Ferrari engine upgrade arrives in Austria. #F1

article.headline: From 66 to 41: How Hamilton's 2026 Title Math Has Transformed in Two Weeks

- [MEDIUM] Hamilton needs to gain average 2.7 pts per remaining race to overtake Antonelli if leader doesn't score

stories.title: Mercedes Battery Fix — What Wolff Promised Before Austria
stories.angle: Three battery failures in Mercedes-customer cars in three races (Russell-Canada, Norris-Monaco, Antonelli-Barcelona). Wolff said in a reliability pledge that the issue would be resolved before Austria. Russell's Montreal battery is on sea freight — the solution has to be a new spec. What exactly is Mercedes fixing, and does the triple-header give them enough time?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
3 battery failures in 6 weeks:
— Russell, Canada
— Norris, Monaco
— Antonelli, Barcelona (with 3 laps left while leading)

Same symptom. Three teams. Toto Wolff says it's fixed before Austria.

We'll see. 👀 #F1 #Mercedes

article.headline: Three Failures, Three Teams, Six Weeks: What Is Killing Mercedes' Battery Systems?
